meaning: n.亚丁(也门人民共和国首都,临亚丁湾)
examples: Their effect may be merely to shift the problem from the Gulf of Aden to the Indian Ocean.
Somalia's chaos is just across the Gulf of Aden from Yemen.
He says tens of thousands flee across the Gulf of Aden seeking a better life.
The al-Shabab militia confirmed that its leader, Aden Hashi Ayro, was killed along with several others.
Captain Haines once hung the corpse of a would-be murderer in chains from Aden's Barrier Gate.
